sparringDesc: Sparring Mode allows two players to kill each other without losing experience points. Both players need to enable sparring mode before fighting.
unlearnDesc:
You can unlearn an ability by right clicking on the ability.

Unlearning requires unlearn point which you can acquired by consuming specific items (see handbook for more details).

Unlearning have a {0} cooldown before you can unlearn again.
layout-edit-hint: Drag with the mouse · Mouse wheel - resize · {0} - save and exit
custominfo-left-desc: Here you can learn more about the available features.
custominfo-shortdesc-1: Information about customizing the xSkills and xSkills Gilded interface
custominfo-details-1:
Interface Editor

xSkills lets you freely customize the position of various interface elements, including XP notifications, level-up messages, the effects window, and the xSkills Gilded window itself.

All editable elements will be highlighted with a colored outline. The size of any element can be adjusted using the mouse wheel.

Press F6 (default) to enter edit mode. For more precise adjustments, use the Settings button in the same menu.

Editing the xSkills Gilded window:
First open the menu with O (default), then press F6 to enter edit mode.
custominfo-shortdesc-2: A brief explanation of how to unlearn a skill.
custominfo-details-2:
Unlearning Points

Unlearning Points allow you to remove any learned skill. One point lets you unlearn a single skill.
Afterward, a penalty is applied: by default, you cannot unlearn any other skills for 2 hours.

You can earn Unlearning Points by drinking alcohol, such as wine or distilled alcohol. Distilled alcohol is so strong that it grants multiple points at once.
custominfo-details-3:
Hotkeys
The mod includes many hotkeys. Below is a description of each one.
Y - Lock Strong Back slots
Locks the Strong Back perk slots so they are ignored by inventory sorting.
R - Toggle Hotbar
Swaps the first 3 or 6 hotbar slots (depending on perk level) with the Strong Back slots.
P - Night Vision On/Off
Enables or disables the CatEyes night vision effect.
L - Switch CatEyes Filters
Cycles through the available CatEyes color filters.
J - Walker On/Off
Temporarily disables the Walker perk.
F7 - XP Notifications On/Off
Enables or disables floating skill XP notifications.
F6 - Edit GUI Layout
Opens the xSkills interface editor to move and resize HUD elements.
K - Show/Hide Skills Menu
Opens or hides the classic xSkills skills menu.
B - Show/Hide Effects HUD
Shows or hides the active effects window and timers.
O - Show/Hide xSkills Gilded Menu
Opens or hides the main xSkills Gilded skills menu.
custominfo-shortdesc-3: Learn what each hotkey is used for.
